file_generation_templates.overview: Templates for generating each file type in a WXO agent project. All templates use generic placeholders — replace with domain-specific values.

placeholders.placeholder: User-friendly agent name (e.g., Customer Service Agent)
Domain or industry (e.g., healthcare, retail, finance)
Types of messages the agent generates

key_points.point: Include 5 message types with HTML templates
Embed data directly — WXO cannot access local files
Tools must be self-contained, NOT call other tools

knowledge_base_template.template:
spec_version: v1 name: {domain}_{entity_type}_kb description: | Comprehensive knowledge base for {Agent Display Name}. Contains: - {Entity Type} profiles and information - {Data type 2} (e.g., location data, reference data) - {Data type 3} (e.g., documentation, guides)
documents: - ../data/{entity_type}.csv - ../data/{reference_data_1}.csv - ../data/{reference_data_2}.csv
vector_index: embeddings_model_name: ibm/slate-125m-english-rtrvr-v2
metadata: domain: "{domain}" entity_type: "{entity_type}" version: "1.0" last_updated: "{YYYY-MM-DD}"

guidelines.guideline: Include 5-10 diverse sample records representing all tiers

critical_requirements.requirement: EVERY script MUST resolve SCRIPT_DIR and PROJECT_ROOT
EVERY script MUST cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" before orchestrate commands
deploy_all.sh MUST call sub-scripts using "$SCRIPT_DIR/" prefix, NOT "./"
Scripts must NOT call `orchestrate env activate`

script_boilerplate.template: # Get script directory and project root SCRIPT_DIR="$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" && pwd )" PROJECT_ROOT="$( cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd )" cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"

deploy_all_template.template: #!/bin/bash set -e SCRIPT_DIR="$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" && pwd )" PROJECT_ROOT="$( cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd )" echo "==========================================" echo "Deploying {Agent Display Name}" echo "==========================================" cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" echo "Step 1: Importing tools..." "$SCRIPT_DIR/import_tools.sh" echo "" echo "Step 2: Importing knowledge base..." "$SCRIPT_DIR/import_kb.sh" echo "" echo "Step 3: Deploying agent..." "$SCRIPT_DIR/deploy_agent.sh" echo "" echo "==========================================" echo "✓ {Agent Display Name} deployed successfully!" echo "=========================================="

import_tools_template.template: #!/bin/bash set -e SCRIPT_DIR="$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" && pwd )" PROJECT_ROOT="$( cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd )" echo "Importing tools..." cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" echo "1. Importing {entity_type}_tools.py..." uvx --from ibm-watsonx-orchestrate orchestrate tools import -k python -f tools/{entity_type}_tools.py echo "✓ {Entity Type} tools imported" echo "2. Importing communication_tools.py..." uvx --from ibm-watsonx-orchestrate orchestrate tools import -k python -f tools/communication_tools.py echo "✓ Communication tools imported" echo "==========================================" echo "✓ All tools imported successfully!" echo "=========================================="

import_kb_template.template: #!/bin/bash set -e SCRIPT_DIR="$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" && pwd )" PROJECT_ROOT="$( cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd )" echo "Importing knowledge base..." cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" uvx --from ibm-watsonx-orchestrate orchestrate knowledge-bases import -f knowledge_bases/{domain}_{entity_type}_kb.yaml echo "==========================================" echo "✓ Knowledge base imported successfully!" echo "=========================================="

deploy_agent_template.template: #!/bin/bash set -e SCRIPT_DIR="$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" && pwd )" PROJECT_ROOT="$( cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd )" echo "Deploying agent..." cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" AGENT_NAME=$(grep "^name:" agent_config.yaml | head -1 | awk '{print $2}') if [ -z "$AGENT_NAME" ]; then echo "ERROR: Could not extract agent name from agent_config.yaml" exit 1 fi uvx --from ibm-watsonx-orchestrate orchestrate agents import -f agent_config.yaml uvx --from ibm-watsonx-orchestrate orchestrate agents deploy -n "$AGENT_NAME" echo "==========================================" echo "✓ Agent '$AGENT_NAME' deployed successfully!" echo "=========================================="

instructions.instruction: Replace ALL placeholders with domain-specific values
Sample queries MUST use real entity IDs from the embedded data
The Example Interaction should show a realistic response

step.details: Replace all placeholders with domain-specific values
Rename, update embedded data structure and sample data
Create realistic sample data in CSV format
Set correct name and document paths

step.action: Ask user for WXO API key and activate environment
step.details: echo "API_KEY" | uvx --from ibm-watsonx-orchestrate orchestrate env activate wxo-uv-env
